message:
test(fcp-core): pin TransportMode + ZoneTransportPolicy serde + truth table (flywheel_connectors-cfwab)

Bead asks for ZoneRoute Display + serde tag. fcp-core has no type
literally named ZoneRoute; the zone-to-zone transport surface
("how does a request reach this zone?") splits across TransportMode
(policy.rs:31, 3-variant snake_case classifier Lan/Derp/Funnel) and
ZoneTransportPolicy (policy.rs:42, 3-boolean per-zone struct).
Neither implements Display, so the bead's "Display formatting" ask
has no analogue — pinning targets serde wire form + the allows()
truth table.

Coverage:
- TransportMode per-variant JSON tag pinned (lan/derp/funnel)
- JSON + CBOR round-trip per variant
- PascalCase + unknown rejected (drift sentinel for any future
  rename_all swap)
- 3-variant count + pairwise distinctness
- ZoneTransportPolicy::allows() truth table for every (policy × mode)
  combination — 8 policies × 3 modes = 24 cases
- Default policy = LAN-only (allow_lan=true, derp/funnel=false) —
  loud DEFAULT-POSTURE pinning
- ZoneTransportPolicy JSON shape (3-field object with explicit
  snake_case field names; PascalCase / camelCase / kebab-case
  forms rejected)
- ZoneTransportPolicy round-trip preserves every flag for all 8
  combinations through both JSON and CBOR; allows() agrees
  post-roundtrip
- Cross-format consistency: JSON and CBOR decode to the same policy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
